examples: The ceasefire brought about a semblance of peace.
Life at last returned to some semblance of normality.
At least a semblance of normality has been restored to parts of the country.
"There is some semblance of calm returning, " says Duvvuri Subbarao, governor of the central bank.
To help consumers retain some semblance of privacy, one must explore the role of regulatory oversight.
